116.reason: This shifts vertex pointers but doesn't update vertex numbers (g[i]->no remains unchanged)

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  This shifts vertex pointers but doesn't update vertex numbers (g[i]->no remains unchanged)
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  This shifts vertex pointers but does not update vertex numbers (g[i]->no), causing mismatch between index and stored vertex number. Also, after deletion, vertex labels are no longer 0..n-2 as expected.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This shifts vertex pointers but does not update vertex numbers (g[i]->no), causing mismatch between index and stored vertex number]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Vertex relabeling by shifting array causes incorrect vertex numbering; violates problem requirement that vertices remain labeled 0 to n-1 after deletion]

142.reason: Vertex labels are decremented, but traversal assumes original labeling (e.g., starting from 0)

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  Vertex labels are decremented, but traversal assumes original labeling (e.g., starting from 0)
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  This decrements neighbor indices to account for deleted vertex, but only works if all vertices after 'quit' are shifted down 鈥 however, the earlier loop shifts g[] pointers but doesn't reassign g[i]->no, so traversal uses wrong labels.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Vertex positions are decremented, but the graph structure after deletion assumes original numbering; this renumbering breaks traversal logic because DFS/BFS still use original indices like 0, but edges now point to shifted numbers]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Changing vertex labels in adjacency lists breaks the invariant that vertices are labeled 0 to n-1; traversal must use original labels excluding deleted vertex, not relabeled ones]
